name: Banana Jumbos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Buttermilk (or regular milk with a little vinegar)
Chocolate Chips - My mom makes 1.5 batches per package
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Crisco, Sugar, Eggs, Vanilla, Flour, Milk, Mashed Bananas, and Chocolate Chips in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Chill the mixture for 1 hour before baking.
3. Spoon the batter onto a cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes.
